grant_title: New HUD Grants Allow WinnResidential to Expand Financial Self-Sufficiency Program for Low-Income Families
geographic_restrictions: Nationwide (U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) grants for HUD-assisted families)
project_area: Financial self-sufficiency programs for low-income families in affordable housing communities
demographic_requirements: Families receiving HUD housing assistance (e.g., Section 8, public housing) and residing in WinnResidential-managed communities
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, affordable housing property managers, public housing authorities, and mission-driven housing developers operating in HUD-assisted housing communities. The program targets low-income families in federally subsidized housing, with a focus on financial coaching, savings incentives, and supportive services to achieve economic mobility.
